cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out between what times Richard could have gone to the basketball court today. The options are given as (A) 3pm to 7pm, (B) 5am to 7am, (C) 7pm to 8pm, and (D) 7am to 3pm. The problem gives me several clues about Richard's activities and times when he was seen in different places. First, let me list out all the information provided: 1. Richard woke up at 5am. 2. Elizabeth saw Richard taking photos near the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 5am to 7am. 3. Lisa saw Richard fixing their computer at the electronic store from 3pm to 7pm. 4. Leslie saw Richard reading at the library from 7pm to 8pm. 5. The basketball court was closed after 8pm. So the question is: Between what times could Richard have gone to the basketball court? The key here is to determine the time periods when Richard was not doing any of the activities mentioned above and could have gone to the basketball court before it closed at 8pm.
